arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Konrad Laimer, Alphonso Davies excited, optimistic to face Bayer Leverkusen in Champions League
arts.sum: Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen? Just about everyone is eager to see Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen go at it again this season.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany has won the full support of the Bayern Munich dressing room through communication and empathy
arts.sum: What Bayern bosses are convinced of the most about Kompany is that the players like him, he has the dressing room fully behind him. After the game, instead of criticizing the performance, the coach told his players in the internal speech:

arts.ttl: Tottenham 0-1 Man City: Erling Haaland emulates Ruud Van Nistelrooy, Harry Kane scoring records in Premier League win
arts.sum: Erling Haaland emulates two Premier League scoring records held by Ruud van Nistelrooy and Harry Kane after scoring the only goal in Man City's 1-0 win at Tottenham on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: VfB Stuttgart vs. Bayern Munich (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is looking to stay hot and in form against a very good side from VfB Stuttgart before entertaining Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League next week. A look at the rosters and injuries for VfB Stuttgart and Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies’ agent confirms they had several discussions in January with Real Madrid and three other European clubs
arts.sum: Bayern Munich player Alphonso Davies signed a contract extension until 2030 early in February, putting to an end a saga that spanned over 18 months and always seemed to be headed towards the Canadian’s departure to Real Madrid . “But in the end, there was no signed agreement or commitment to any club, as we left the door open for the player to evaluate all options himself.

arts.ttl: Following Jamie Carragher’s Bayern Munich commentary, Boris Becker, Rio Ferdinand chime in for an exchange
arts.sum: After Jamie Carragher offered up some pointed commentary at Bayern Munich and Vincent Kompany, tennis legend Boris Becker felt inclined to pick up his phone and offer a retort to the noted pundit: One thing we are sure of, you did not expect the Jamie Carragher-Boris Becker-Rio Ferdinand X platform exchange on your BFW Bingo card for today — but you got it anyway.

arts.ttl: Thomas Müller still considers his future to be at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: According to Bild, Thomas Müller is still willing to sign a contract extension at Bayern Munich, should talks with Der Rekordmeister progress. Previously, it had been reported that the record…
